commands.argv: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
commands.summary: 59 stdlib tests passed; adapter-specific tests are intentionally targeted because the adapter parent test directory is outside the WS-10 write set.

commands.summary: Current tree neutrality scan passed with zero findings.

summary: WS-10 adds Codex EXPERIMENTAL offline adapter projection without duplicating lifecycle core semantics.
